name: Leaked Documents Reveal Identities of Iran International Staff
message: Arghavan ShamsArghavan Shams is a journalist and the person responsible for promoting LGBTQ-related issues inside Iran, currently working with Iran International network.   Nadia Tariqi Nadia, You’ve operated behind the curtain long enough. For years, your fingerprints have been on the editorial pulse of Iran International. The headlines, the angles, the frames , many…
